message:
Add status type tests, pressure field support, and display improvements

status_types.rs:
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] on SystemPosture::label() to suppress warning
  (method is part of the public API contract but only used in tests).
- Flatten nested if-let + condition into combined let-chains for
  unreachable worker remediation check, improving readability.
- Add comprehensive test coverage for SystemPosture (from_status for
  RemoteReady/Degraded/LocalOnly, label/description, serialization).
- Add worker remediation tests covering all hint types: circuit_open,
  circuit_half_open, pressure_critical, pressure_warning,
  pressure_telemetry_gap, worker_unreachable, healthy (no hints),
  and open-circuit-suppresses-unreachable deduplication.
- Add convergence remediation tests: drifting, failed, stale, ready
  (no hints), and per-worker remediation forwarding.
- Add UnifiedStatusResponse serialization test and schema version
  constant verification.
- Add RemediationHint serialization test verifying skip_serializing_if
  behavior for None worker_id.

status_display.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] for render_full_status_to
  (function signature is stable and splitting it would hurt readability).
- Convert nested if-let + condition patterns to let-chains for pressure
  state and reason code rendering.
- Add missing pressure_* fields to WorkerStatusFromApi test fixtures
  (11 new Optional fields added in the pressure monitoring feature).
- Reformat render_full_status_to call sites in tests to multi-line
  for readability.

commands/status.rs:
- Fix import ordering to match rustfmt conventions.

transfer.rs:
- Reformat long format! string in build_remote_command to multi-line.

tui/app.rs, ui/workers.rs:
- Add pressure_* field defaults to WorkerStatusFromApi test fixtures
  to match the updated struct definition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
